steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence: "More recently, British recording artist Charli XCX has contributed to that sound by incorporating pop melodies into it." Read what the sentence actually does — don't assume; check each claim against the text.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘It identifies an artist who has contributed a new stylistic element to the hyperpop sound.’: The sentence names Charli XCX and specifies her contribution — adding pop melodies, which is a stylistic element not previously mentioned for hyperpop. This matches exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘It criticizes a later hyperpop artist for being too similar to an earlier hyperpop artist.’: No criticism appears in the sentence; "has contributed" is positive. Nothing suggests similarity to Laura Les. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘It praises a particular hyperpop artist for consistently evolving through the years.’: The sentence is a single observation about one contribution; there is no mention of consistent evolution over time. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘It asserts that the hyperpop sound hasn't changed, even though new artists have adopted it.’: The opposite is true — Charli XCX changed the sound by adding pop melodies. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
